programme.title: Playing Nice
programme.desc: The conclusion of the psychological thriller series. The final court hearing looms and the boys' fate must be decided as Pete and Maddie look set to lose everything.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Bus depot sitcom. Stan and Jack find themselves involved in a fishy tale about a lost diamond.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring British sitcom. Jack gets promoted to the role of inspector as Stan gets more than he bargained for when he invites a new conductor home for tea.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a two-man bus crew. Arthur is attracted to Beryl the clippie, but Beryl has only two interests in life - athletic men and those with a good head of hair.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: After a night on guard outside Freddie's house, Donna is torn when she realises her mum's court case will be starting shortly. Pearl is shocked to be caught red handed.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ted and Tina get Number Eight ready for a party, Lloyd warns Becky that Michelle has worked out that Steve had a one-night stand, and Ken has some art-related news for Ashley.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tina and David survey the post-party damage at Number Eight, Sally is intent on going to the police and shopping Teresa, and Jason is pleased to receive a birthday card from Becky.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The sudden death of a convict leads Inspector Morse and Sergeant Lewis to investigate the complex affairs of three businessmen jailed for fraud.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series. Nick investigates a spate of burglaries, and Greengrass and Blaketon become trapped underground while searching for buried treasure.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sitting Off the Dock of the Bay: Nostalgic police drama series. When a pirate radio station invades the airwaves, Blaketon dispatches Nick to investigate.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a body is found in woodland near Midsomer Sonning, country magazine Midsomer Life and its outspoken owner Guy Sandys come under scrutiny from Barnaby and Jones.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Bob begs Viv to keep fighting her case when she tells him she is going to change her plea in court. Paul and Nicola accidentally use Diane's clothes to make their quilt.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nicola and Paul replace the clothes they used in the quilt and luckily Diane sees the funny side - but a text from Jonny halts the merriment.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Michelle gets a dressing-down from Dan in front of a packed pub. Vernon broaches the subject of a business venture with Liz, and Ted tries to clean up the Platts' house.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz fails to muster up the same enthusiasm as Vernon when they view the new bar. Michelle asks Becky to take over from Leanne in the Rovers.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. The village is put in jeopardy when a kidnapping case takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series. Nick's pursuit of an escaped prisoner leads him into a more complex case, and Greengrass becomes a school lollipop man but his new job is soon put in jeopardy.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dressed like a bride and drowned in a bath, it triggers a spate of ghoulish wedding-themed murders - is history repeating itself.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part One: Gritty detective series. The discovery of a gun in the bedroom of a neighbour sees Banks involved in an internal investigation that could break up the team.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part Two: Crime drama series. While Helen's career hangs in the balance, Banks risks everything to rescue his daughter who has been taken hostage by Jaff Kitson.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A reunion at Oxford's last all-female college ends in tragedy when one of the alumnae is killed - is it connected to an attack there ten years before.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal at the Luxton Bus Company. Temperatures rise when the station surgery gets a new recruit.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Classic sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. The inspector bans all the garage staff from smoking on duty - with dangerous consequences.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Classic sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan loses his wages at the dog track and is unable to pay housekeeping money to his mum.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Bob begs Viv to keep fighting her case when she tells him she is going to change her plea in court. Paul and Nicola accidentally use Diane's clothes to make their quilt.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nicola and Paul replace the clothes they used in the quilt and luckily Diane sees the funny side - but a text from Jonny halts the merriment.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Michelle gets a dressing-down from Dan in front of a packed pub. Vernon broaches the subject of a business venture with Liz, and Ted tries to clean up the Platts' house.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz fails to muster up the same enthusiasm as Vernon when they view the new bar. Michelle asks Becky to take over from Leanne in the Rovers.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: When tragedy strikes in his own family, Morse's investigation into the death of a bright young girl leads him into an alien world of raves and smart drugs.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. The village is put in jeopardy when a kidnapping case takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series. Nick's pursuit of an escaped prisoner leads him into a more complex case, and Greengrass becomes a school lollipop man but his new job is soon put in jeopardy.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate the secretive world of Midsomer's Magic Circle when a magician's assistant drops dead during a show after being poisoned.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Andy startles Jo by telling her he would like to start trying for a baby. Val returns from her holiday and has some explaining to do when Eric spots a tattoo on her back.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: When a friend from Val's holiday arrives in the village, Pollard spies an opportunity to get answers. Donna decides to leave the police and Doug looks forward to Hilary's return.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz makes a shocking confession to Vernon, and Rita rises to the bait when Tony makes her a proposition - much to Norris's dismay. Claire's windfall causes friction.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony's offer prompts Rita to begin exploring retirement options. The Peacocks realise they've outstayed their welcome at the Websters', and Jason has a heart-to-heart with Becky.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series. Nick's job intrudes on his social life when news of an antiques theft interrupts a date, and Greengrass's nephew turns up with a proposition.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series. The police are baffled by a campaign of threats against a local shopkeeper. Gina's new boyfriend is hired as pub chef.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama. After getting caught in a storm, Vera comes across an abandoned car with a baby inside and is forced to seek refuge at a familiar house..

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part One: Crime drama. When the team piece together the movements of a young woman found dead on waste ground, they uncover a world of prostitution and drugs.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part Two: Crime drama series. As the investigation into Katrin Vesik's murder and her sister's disappearance continues, a man's body is found near Katrin's grave.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a student dies during a clinical trial for a new drug, Lewis uncovers a web of lies, jealousy and madness that he himself could fall victim to.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan and Jack find themselves involved in a fishy tale about a lost diamond.
